# @pondoknusa/cache

Cache stores and repository for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/cache
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `2.0.0` |
| Source | [`packages/cache`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/cache) |
| Category | Platform services |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

- [@pondoknusa/redis](/reference/generated/packages/redis)
